mapper.insert: INSERT INTO ${tableName} (community_id, house_no, car_number, vehicle_type, enter_time, status, create_time, update_time) VALUES (#{record.communityId}, #{record.houseNo}, #{record.carNumber}, #{record.vehicleType}, #{record.enterTime}, #{record.status}, NOW(), NOW())
mapper.update: UPDATE ${tableName} SET handler_admin_id = #{record.handlerAdminId}, handle_time = #{record.handleTime}, handle_remark = #{record.handleRemark}, status = #{record.status}, update_time = NOW() WHERE id = #{record.id}
